heading: Annual budget list
label: 5371 Annual budget list
text: The Secretary shall list, in the annual budget request submitted to Congress under , any funds proposed to be included in funding agreements authorized under this subchapter.section 1105 of title 31
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 5364 of this titlePub. L. 116–180
